# ICT120 Final Project - CIFAR-10 Image Classification

## Setup
1. Install dependencies:
   pip install -r requirements.txt

2. Train and save model:
   Run notebook/cifar10_cnn.ipynb
   This will generate webapp/cifar10_model.h5

3. Launch web app:
   cd webapp
   python app.py
   Open http://127.0.0.1:5000 in browser
